# Krunal Badami
> Senior Software Architect & Engineering Consultant | React Native, Python, Roku/OTT, IT Consulting Expert

Krunal Badami is a senior technical leader with 8+ years of experience architecting and delivering high-scale digital products (2M+ monthly users with 99.9% reliability). He specializes in React Native development, Python backend, Roku/OTT platforms, web development, and IT consulting services for startups, SMEs, and enterprises worldwide.

## Professional Services
- **IT Consulting**: Technical architecture, system design, team leadership, engineering strategy
- **Software Development**: React Native, Python/Django, Node.js, React/Next.js, full-stack solutions
- **Mobile Development**: Cross-platform iOS/Android apps with React Native, native modules, performance optimization
- **TV & OTT Development**: Roku/BrightScript, Apple TV, Android TV, Fire TV, streaming platforms, HLS/DASH, DRM
- **Web Development**: Modern React/Next.js applications, TypeScript, responsive design, SEO optimization
- **Backend Development**: Python/Django, Node.js/Express, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, REST/GraphQL APIs
- **Cloud & DevOps**: AWS, Google Cloud, Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD pipelines
- **Quality Assurance**: Testing strategies, automation, performance testing, security auditing

## Business Focus
- **Target Clients**: Startups, SMEs, enterprises, technology companies, digital agencies
- **Service Models**: Project-based, hourly consulting, dedicated engineer, team augmentation
- **Industries**: Fintech, healthcare, e-commerce, education, media streaming, SaaS
- **Geographic Coverage**: Mumbai (India), USA, UK, Canada, Australia, Europe - Remote & On-site

## Technical Expertise
- **Mobile Development**: React Native, TypeScript, iOS Native, Android Native, Redux, React Query, Navigation, Expo, Firebase, Push Notifications, App Store Deployment
- **Backend Development**: Python, Django, Flask, Node.js, Express.js, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, REST APIs, GraphQL, Microservices
- **Web Development**: React, Next.js, TypeScript, JavaScript ES6+, HTML5/CSS3, SASS/SCSS, Tailwind CSS, Progressive Web Apps, SEO Optimization
- **TV & OTT Platforms**: Roku, BrightScript, SceneGraph, Apple TV, Fire TV, Android TV, Chromecast, AirPlay, HLS Streaming, DASH Protocol, DRM Integration
- **Cloud & DevOps**: AWS, Google Cloud, Azure, Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD Pipelines, GitHub Actions, Jenkins, Terraform, Monitoring, Logging
- **Database & Storage**: PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, Redis, AWS S3, Cloud Storage
- **Testing & QA**: Unit Testing, Integration Testing, E2E Testing, Jest, React Testing Library, Cypress, Performance Testing, Security Testing
- **Architecture & Design**: System Architecture, Microservices, API Design, Database Design, Performance, Security, Scalability, Cloud Architecture

## Business Capabilities
- **Consulting Services**: System architecture design, technology stack selection, performance optimization, security architecture, scalability planning
- **Team Leadership**: Team mentoring, code reviews, technical roadmapping, agile implementation, quality assurance, technical writing
- **Project Management**: Project estimation, timeline planning, resource allocation, risk management, delivery coordination
- **Client Engagement**: Requirements analysis, solution design, stakeholder communication, progress reporting, post-launch support

## Key Achievements & Impact
- **Scale & Reliability**: Led teams delivering platforms serving 2M+ monthly active users with 99.9% uptime
- **Open Source Contributions**: Published 7 React Native libraries with 2M+ downloads on npm
- **Performance Optimization**: Reduced production crashes by 50% and bundle sizes by 35%
- **Multi-Platform Expertise**: Architected solutions for 7+ platforms (iOS, Android, Roku, Apple TV, Android TV, Fire TV, Web)
- **Leadership Success**: Mentored development teams, implemented best practices, improved code quality and delivery processes
- **Client Success**: Delivered projects for major brands including The Daily Wire, PragerU, 28 by Evie, and Big Time Rush

## Pricing & Availability
- **Consulting Rate**: ₹2,500/hour for technical consulting and architecture design
- **Project Rates**: Starting from ₹25,000 for basic web presence to ₹3,50,000 for enterprise solutions
- **Dedicated Engineer**: ₹85,000/month for full-time commitment (160 hours/month)
- **Response Time**: 24 hours for initial consultation, flexible scheduling for ongoing projects
- **Engagement Models**: Fixed-price projects, hourly consulting, monthly retainers, team augmentation
